ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the crew member */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the crew member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the crew member belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the crew member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the crew member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the crew member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the crew member */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the film project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g. 'in production', 'post-production', etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the project */,
  "hours_worked" TEXT /* Total hours worked by the crew member on the project */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Hourly rate of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits" (
  "credit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each credit entry */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the project */,
  "credit_order" INTEGER /* Order of the credit in the final credit list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES crew_assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message contained in the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the crew member (1-5) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments given by the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
